hero.badge: AI scheduling for medical practices in Morocco
hero.title: Turn every patient inquiry into a confirmed appointment.
hero.description: DarijaDoc automates appointment booking through a medical chatbot and voice assistant in Darija, French, and Arabic, so your team stays focused on care while your calendar stays full.

challenges.title: Even great practices lose patients because calls are missed.
challenges.description: During busy hours, reception teams are overloaded. Our assistant handles peak volume without compromising patient experience.

calls.title: Missed calls
calls.description: When the line is busy, many patients simply move to another doctor.

admin.title: Administrative overload
admin.description: Staff spend too much time on repetitive tasks instead of higher-value patient support.

patientExperience.title: Inconsistent patient journey
patientExperience.description: Late responses and unclear information reduce trust and satisfaction.

features.title: Everything your clinic needs to schedule without friction.
features.description: A focused, elegant, and secure product for private practices, group clinics, and medical centers.

booking.title: Smart appointment booking
booking.description: The chatbot suggests relevant slots automatically based on your schedule and rules.

reminders.title: Automated reminders
reminders.description: Pre-visit reminders through SMS and WhatsApp to reduce no-shows.

multilingual.title: Local patient communication
multilingual.description: Natural interactions in Darija, French, and Arabic for better accessibility.

integration.title: Workflow integration
integration.description: Connect to your current agenda and operations quickly, with minimal disruption.

security.title: Data protection
security.description: Built with privacy-first principles and clear action traceability.

support.title: Dedicated onboarding
support.description: Hands-on setup and monthly optimization to maximize outcomes.

demo.title: Go live in less than one week.
demo.description: No internal technical team required. We configure your patient flow and booking logic end-to-end.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.text: Discovery workshop: specialty, call volume, and appointment types.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.text: Conversation scripts and scheduling rules are tailored to your clinic.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.text: Launch, live testing, and continuous monthly performance tuning.

testimonials.title: Doctors getting measurable time and revenue gains.
testimonials.description: Real-world impact observed within the first few weeks.

one.quote: Our front desk is no longer overwhelmed. Patients now get clear responses even after hours.

pricing.title: Simple subscription plans aligned with your growth.
pricing.description: Start lean and scale capacity with your patient demand.

starter.label: Essential Practice

features.f3: WhatsApp and email support in under 24h

growth.label: Growth Practice

faq.title: What doctors ask before getting started.

q1.question: Can the chatbot really book appointments in Darija?
q1.answer: Yes. We designed the conversation flow in natural Darija, with medical context, until booking confirmation.

q2.question: How long does deployment take?
q2.answer: Usually between 3 and 7 business days from kickoff to go-live.

q3.question: Will it fit our existing organization?
q3.answer: Yes. The platform is configured around your current scheduling process and operational preferences.

q4.question: Is there a long-term commitment?
q4.answer: Plans are monthly and upgradeable. You can move between tiers as your clinic evolves.

finalCta.title: Make your patient intake a predictable growth channel.
finalCta.description: Book a tailored demo and receive a clear implementation roadmap for your specialty.
